title: prioria joveri
intro: Prioria joveri, also known as the "joveri tree" or "velvet bean tree," is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to act as a natural source of rotenone, a compound with anthelmintic and insecticidal properties. The health benefits of Prioria joveri include its potential to treat various parasitic infections, as well as its use in traditional medicine to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. Herbal preparations of Prioria joveri can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
